narrative:
Beavercreek 005 (precinct in Greene County) has 683 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.5 percentage points.
